The '''etheric rudder''' was a device for maneuvering [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. It allowed them to make sharp turns without the use of [[attitude thruster]]s, allowing for precision thrust vectoring and enhanced maneuverability; in the case of [[4L4 fusial thrust engine/Legends|4L4 fusial thrust engines]], maneuverability was so increased that pilots likened it to flying a T-16 skyhopper in atmospheric flight.<ref name="Rogue">''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]''</ref> Etheric rudder prototypes were also used on [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter|Recon-Xs]].<ref name="Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron">[[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron|''Star Wars Handbook'' 1: ''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'']]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The term was created by [[Timothy Zahn]] for ''[[Heir to the Empire]]''. He felt that the term never quite caught on, and thus was quietly dropped.<ref name="Heir 20">''[[Heir to the Empire: The 20th Anniversary Edition]]''</ref>
